problem.title: Challenges or Hidden Opportunities?
problem.subtitle: Behind every operational bottleneck lies a huge opportunity to lead the market if you move fast.

column1.title: Time & Cost Leaks
items: Your daily workflow still relies on physical documents and exhausting manual methods.
Data is locked in separate isolated folders—never talking to each other or integrated.
Operational costs continue to swell without visibility into where the leaks are.
Workflows are too long, slow, and highly prone to human error.

column2.title: Direction Blindness & Loss of Momentum
items: Taking important decisions is like walking in the dark due to a lack of real-time visual reports.
Valuable field assets are difficult to monitor accurately and transparently.
Aware of the power of AI and Geographic Information Systems (GIS), but confused about how to adopt them into your business operations.

evolve.description: Developing new features in line with your business scale growth.

devops.description: Manage cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and ensure ongoing system availability and security.

Basic understanding of the desired position
Able to commit a minimum of 20 hours per week for 3–6 months
Self-driven, proactive, and highly eager to learn
Portfolio or personal projects (GitHub, Behance, or similar)

pageHeader.title: Portfolio
pageHeader.description: See how we build future technology solutions that provide a real impact for our partner businesses.

empty.title: No Projects
empty.description: No projects found in this category.

webgisLand.title: WebGIS Land Monitoring
webgisLand.description: Smart spatial mapping, satellite imagery vegetation analysis, and integration of 12,000+ national boundary coordinates for public forestry agency.
webgisLand.challenge: Monitoring vast national forest boundaries and identifying vegetation changes in hard-to-reach locations.
webgisLand.solution: Developed a custom WebGIS application integrated with PostgreSQL/PostGIS spatial database and Leaflet.js map visualization.
results: Real-time forestry boundary mapping
Automated satellite imagery analysis for vegetation detection
Precise integration of 12,000+ spatial coordinates
Data transparency for both agency and public

portalEcommerce.title: Web Portal & E-Commerce
portalEcommerce.description: Development of interactive corporate website, custom CMS, and e-commerce platform integrated with payment gateway to enhance branding and optimize digital transaction conversion 24/7.
portalEcommerce.challenge: Unifying a professional corporate identity with a fast, secure online portal for transactions.
portalEcommerce.solution: Built a responsive website using React / Next.js and Tailwind CSS connected to a Node.js backend and local payment gateway.
results: Seamless multi-functional corporate & transaction platform
Payment gateway integration for automated billing
Optimized assets and code for rapid page loading
Easy-to-use custom CMS for catalog administration

aiCustomerAgent.title: AI Customer Agent & OCR
aiCustomerAgent.description: Automated physical document digitization with 98% accuracy (OCR) and conversational AI agent based on LLM serving customer queries 24/7.
aiCustomerAgent.challenge: High operational overhead from manual physical document entry and massive repeat query volumes overloading customer service.
aiCustomerAgent.solution: Implemented a computer-vision-based OCR pipeline and conversational AI agents powered by LangChain and FastAPI.
results: 98% accuracy in document digitization automation
Responsive customer service query handling 24/7
CSR workload reduced by up to 60%
LLM context-aligned integration based on business parameters

nurasaStore.title: Nurasa Store
nurasaStore.description: Interactive landing page to promote Nurasa products with modern design and high performance.
nurasaStore.challenge: Building an engaging online presence for F&B products to reach more customers.
nurasaStore.solution: Landing page development using React and Vite with smooth and responsive animations.
results: Increased online brand visibility
Fast and easy product information access
Interactive and responsive user experience

yogiBusana.title: Yogi Busana
yogiBusana.description: Portfolio website and product catalog for Yogi Busana clothing store with multi-language support.
yogiBusana.challenge: Showcasing clothing collections with appealing visuals and reaching local as well as international customers.
yogiBusana.solution: Creation of an SEO-optimized website with internationalization (i18n) features.
results: Easily accessible digital product catalog
Multi-language support for international customers
Increased digital brand awareness

mobileAppTracking.title: Logistics Tracking App
mobileAppTracking.description: Modern mobile application for real-time delivery route tracking, fleet management, and automated status updates for customers.
mobileAppTracking.challenge: Difficulty in tracking fleets in real-time and providing accurate estimated times of arrival (ETA) to customers amidst dynamic traffic.
mobileAppTracking.solution: Development of a cross-platform mobile application using Flutter, integrated directly with Google Maps API and Firebase backend system.
results: 100% real-time delivery route visibility
Improved ETA accuracy by up to 95%
Reduced customer complaints regarding delivery status
Lightweight and battery-efficient application performance

smartCityGIS.title: Smart City Infrastructure Map
smartCityGIS.description: An interactive 3D dashboard for mapping smart city infrastructure, utility networks, and real-time traffic flows.
smartCityGIS.challenge: City authorities struggled to monitor widespread public infrastructure and quickly detect utility anomalies.
smartCityGIS.solution: We designed a custom WebGIS built on React and Mapbox that aggregates live IoT sensor data from across the city.
results: 40% faster response times for utility maintenance
Accurate real-time traffic data visualization
Enhanced public transparency for city information

hrisPortal.title: Enterprise HRIS Portal
hrisPortal.description: A centralized human resources management platform that simplifies attendance tracking, payroll, and employee performance evaluation.
hrisPortal.challenge: Slow, fragmented legacy systems led to payroll calculation errors and decreased overall employee satisfaction.
hrisPortal.solution: Built a modern, secure, and highly user-friendly HR web portal with seamless integration into corporate attendance machines.
results: Payroll processing completed 3x faster
100% accuracy in attendance and leave claims
Significantly boosted software usability for employees

aiSalesAnalytics.title: Predictive Sales Analytics
aiSalesAnalytics.description: An AI-powered analytics dashboard system that predicts future sales trends and detects market anomalies.
aiSalesAnalytics.challenge: The retail company lost profits due to overstocked inventory and failed to anticipate seasonal demand spikes.
aiSalesAnalytics.solution: Implemented predictive Machine Learning models that analyze billions of historical transaction records in seconds.
results: Monthly sales prediction accuracy reached 92%
25% reduction in inventory holding (overstock) costs
Increased ROI through automated market anomaly detection

healthFitnessApp.title: Health & Fitness Tracker
healthFitnessApp.description: A health and fitness tracking application that directly connects with smart wearables to monitor vital metrics.
healthFitnessApp.challenge: Health app users often lost motivation and found it difficult to interpret raw health data from their smartwatches.
healthFitnessApp.solution: We built a mobile application that translates vital data into user-friendly charts alongside daily workout recommendations.
results: Monthly active user retention spiked by 45%
Seamless data synchronization with various smartwatches
Stunning and modern dark mode interface

pageHeader.title: Privacy Policy
pageHeader.description: How we collect, use, and protect your information.

collection.title: 1. Information We Collect
collection.intro: We collect information you provide directly to us, including:
items: Name, email address, and phone number
Company information and business details
Project requirements and preferences
Communication history and correspondence

usage.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
usage.intro: We use the information we collect to:
items: Provide, maintain, and improve our services
Process your requests and communicate with you
Send technical notices and support messages
Respond to your queries and provide customer service
Analyze usage patterns and optimize user experience

sharing.title: 3. Information Sharing
sharing.intro: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We only share your information in the following circumstances:
items: With your explicit consent
To comply with legal obligations
With trusted service providers who assist our operations
To protect our rights and prevent fraud

security.title: 4. Data Security
security.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.

rights.title: 5. Your Rights
items: Access and receive a copy of your personal data
Request correction of inaccurate information
Request deletion of your personal data
Withdraw consent at any time
File a complaint with a supervisory authority

cookies.title: 6. Cookies and Tracking
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track activity on our website and store certain information. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent.

changes.title: 7. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:

pageHeader.title: Terms of Service
pageHeader.description: Terms and conditions for using our services.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using the services of PT Pilar Inovasi Teknologi ("Pilar Labs"), you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and conditions of this agreement. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.

services.title: 2. Description of Services
services.intro: Pilar Labs provides web development, digital consulting, and related technology services. Our services include but are not limited to:
items: Website development and design
Company profile creation
Landing page development
Website redesign and optimization
Consulting and technical support

obligations.title: 3. User Obligations
items: Provide accurate and complete information
Maintain the confidentiality of your account credentials
Use our services only for lawful purposes
Not disrupt or interfere with the services
Comply with all applicable laws and regulations

payment.title: 4. Payment Terms
payment.intro: All fees are quoted in Indonesian Rupiah (IDR) unless specified otherwise. Payment terms will be outlined in individual project agreements and typically include:
items: Initial deposit upon project kickoff
Milestone-based payments for larger projects
Final payment upon project completion
Additional fees for scope changes or revisions outside agreed limits

intellectual.title: 5. Intellectual Property Rights
intellectual.intro: Upon full payment, the client receives ownership of the final deliverables. However:
items: Pilar Labs retains the right to display the finished work in our portfolio
Pre-existing code, tools, and frameworks remain our property
Open-source components are governed by their respective licenses
We may reuse general methodologies and techniques

timeline.title: 6. Project Timeline
timeline.content: We strive to meet agreed deadlines. However, timelines can be affected by: delayed client feedback, scope changes, technical challenges, or force majeure events. We will communicate promptly about any timeline adjustments.

warranties.title: 7. Warranties and Disclaimers
warranties.intro: We warrant that our services will be performed with professional skill and care. However:
items: We do not guarantee specific business outcomes or results
Third-party integrations and services are provided "as is"
We are not liable for issues arising from client-provided content
Website performance depends on hosting and infrastructure choices

liability.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Pilar Labs' total liability for any claims arising from our services will not exceed the total amount paid by the client for the specific project. We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.

support.title: 9. Support and Maintenance
support.content: Post-launch support and maintenance services are available under separate agreements. Basic technical support is usually included for a specified period after project delivery.

termination.title: 10. Termination
termination.content: Either party may terminate the agreement with written notice. Upon termination, the client is responsible for payment for all work completed up to the date of termination.

governing.title: 11. Governing Law
governing.content: These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Indonesia. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Jakarta.

changes.title: 12. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: For questions about these Terms of Service, please contact:
